nasb.text: So the priest gave him consecrated bread; for there was no bread there but the bread of the Presence which was removed from before the Lord, in order to put hot bread in its place when it was taken away.

esv.text: So the priest gave him the holy bread, for there was no bread there but the bread of the Presence, which is removed from before the Lord, to be replaced by hot bread on the day it is taken away.

cnv.text: 於是祭司把聖餅給他，因為在那裡沒有別的餅，只有陳設餅，就是那些剛從耶和華面前拿下來，為要換上熱的。

ccb.text: 于是，祭司把圣饼给他，因为那里没有别的饼，只有从耶和华的会幕里更换下来的供饼。
